# Pull Request

<!-- What problem does this solve? One or two sentences on the reason —
not a restatement of the diff. -->

## What changed

<!-- Optional: a short summary if the diff is large or spans several areas.
Delete this section for small, single-purpose PRs. -->

## Testing

<!-- How did you verify this works? Tests added/updated, manual steps,
or both. -->

## Screenshots

<!-- Before/after for any UI change. Delete this section if not applicable. -->

## Linked backlog item

Closes <!-- Notion task link or reference -->

---

### Before merging

- [ ] CI passes (GitHub Actions + Vitest) — never merge a red build
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change
- [ ] Previewed on the Vercel deployment (UI or flow changes)
- [ ] Branch is up to date with `main`
